AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class FabricationPartUtils

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Utils
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Utilities for creating and manipulating Revit fabrication parts and their connectors.

public static class FabricationPartUtils
Inheritance
object
FabricationPartUtils
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Includes helpers for creating straight parts, finding service buttons, matching connector sizes, and placing taps/tees using Revit fabrication APIs.

Methods

CreateStraightPart(Document, FabricationServiceButton, int, ElementId, double)

Creates a straight fabrication part from a service button and sets its length.

public static FabricationPart CreateStraightPart(Document doc, FabricationServiceButton button, int condition, ElementId levelId, double length)

Parameters

doc Document

The destination document.

button FabricationServiceButton

The fabrication service button used to create the part.

condition int

The fabrication condition index.

levelId ElementId

The level id used for placement.

length double

The desired length (in Revit internal units).

Returns

FabricationPart

The created Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationPart.

Remarks

This method sets the "Length Option" parameter to "Value" and sets the "Length" parameter to length. Parameter names are string-based and depend on the fabrication content.

Calls Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document.Regenerate after setting parameters to ensure the part updates.

CutInTap(Document, Connector, Connector, double, double, double)

Places a fabrication branch connector as a tap onto a run connector at the specified offset/rotation/angle.

public static void CutInTap(Document doc, Connector branchConnector, Connector runConnector, double offset, double rotation = 0, double angle = 0)

Parameters

doc Document

The document containing the elements.

branchConnector Connector

The connector representing the branch (tap) connection.

runConnector Connector

The connector representing the run (host) connection.

offset double

Offset along the run per Revit API expectation (internal units).

rotation double

Optional rotation about the run connection axis (radians).

angle double

Optional angle value passed to the placement API (radians).

Remarks

Calls Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document.Regenerate after placement.

CutInTee(Document, FabricationPart, Connector, double, double, double)

Places an existing tee fabrication part as a tap onto a run connector by using the tee's branch connector.

public static void CutInTee(Document doc, FabricationPart tee, Connector runConnector, double offset, double rotation = 0, double angle = 0)

Parameters

doc Document

The document containing the elements.

tee FabricationPart

The tee fabrication part to be placed.

runConnector Connector

The connector representing the run (host) connection.

offset double

Offset along the run per Revit API expectation (internal units).

rotation double

Optional rotation about the run connection axis (radians).

angle double

Optional angle value passed to the placement API (radians).

Remarks

The branch connector is selected as the first connector that is neither primary nor secondary. Calls Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document.Regenerate after placement.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when no suitable branch connector can be found on the tee.

FindServiceButton(FabricationService, int, string)

Finds a fabrication service button by exact name match within a palette/group index.

public static FabricationServiceButton FindServiceButton(FabricationService service, int paletteIndex, string buttonName)

Parameters

service FabricationService

The fabrication service.

paletteIndex int

Palette (Revit 2022+) or group (older) index.

buttonName string

Button name to match (case-insensitive).

Returns

FabricationServiceButton

The matching Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationServiceButton, or null if not found.

Remarks

Uses Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationService.GetButtonCount(System.Int32) and Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationService.GetButton(System.Int32,System.Int32). Validates paletteIndex against PaletteCount (2022+) or GroupCount (older).

GetFabricationServiceByNameContains(FabricationConfiguration, string)

Gets the first loaded fabrication service whose name contains the specified substring (case-insensitive).

public static FabricationService GetFabricationServiceByNameContains(this FabricationConfiguration config, string nameContains)

Parameters

config FabricationConfiguration

The fabrication configuration.

nameContains string

Substring to search for within service names.

Returns

FabricationService

The first matching Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationService, or null if not found.

GetFirstNonPrimaryOrSecondaryConnector(ConnectorManager)

Returns the first connector that is neither primary nor secondary from a connector manager.

public static Connector GetFirstNonPrimaryOrSecondaryConnector(ConnectorManager cm)

Parameters

cm ConnectorManager

The connector manager.

Returns

Connector

The first non-primary/non-secondary connector, or null if none is found.

Remarks

Uses Autodesk.Revit.DB.Connector.GetMEPConnectorInfo and checks IsPrimary/IsSecondary.

LocateButton(FabricationService, int, string)

Locates the first fabrication service button in the specified palette/group whose name contains the given substring.

public static FabricationServiceButton LocateButton(this FabricationService service, int palette, string name)

Parameters

service FabricationService

The fabrication service.

palette int

Palette (Revit 2022+) or group (older) index.

name string

Substring to match against button names (case-insensitive).

Returns

FabricationServiceButton

The first matching Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationServiceButton, or null if not found.

Remarks

Performs a contains match rather than an exact match. Validates palette against PaletteCount (2022+) or GroupCount (older).

LocateButtons(FabricationService, int, string)

Locates all fabrication service buttons in the specified palette/group whose names contain the given substring.

public static List<FabricationServiceButton> LocateButtons(this FabricationService service, int palette, string name)

Parameters

service FabricationService

The fabrication service.

palette int

Palette (Revit 2022+) or group (older) index.

name string

Substring to match against button names (case-insensitive).

Returns

List<FabricationServiceButton>

A list of matching buttons. Returns an empty list if inputs are invalid or no matches are found.

Remarks

Validates palette against PaletteCount (2022+) or GroupCount (older).

MatchConnectorSize(Connector, Connector)

Sets the size of connFrom to match connTo based on connector profile shape.

public static void MatchConnectorSize(Connector connFrom, Connector connTo)

Parameters

connFrom Connector

The connector whose size will be updated.

connTo Connector

The connector providing the target size.

Remarks

For rectangular/oval connectors, copies Autodesk.Revit.DB.Connector.Width and Autodesk.Revit.DB.Connector.Height. For round/invalid/other shapes, copies Autodesk.Revit.DB.Connector.Radius.

SizeAlignConnect(Document, Connector, Connector, double)

Matches connector size, aligns the part by connectors, then connects/couples the connectors.

public static void SizeAlignConnect(Document doc, Connector connFrom, Connector connTo, double rotation = 0)

Parameters

doc Document

The document containing the elements.

connFrom Connector

The connector to be modified/aligned from.

connTo Connector

The target connector to align and connect to.

rotation double

Optional rotation about the connection axis (radians).

Remarks

Calls Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document.Regenerate between each operation to ensure geometry/connector state is current.

SizeAlignSlopeConnect(Document, Connector, Connector, double, double, FabricationPartJustification)

Matches connector size, aligns the part by connectors with slope/justification, then connects/couples the connectors.

public static void SizeAlignSlopeConnect(Document doc, Connector connFrom, Connector connTo, double rotation, double slope, FabricationPartJustification justification)

Parameters

doc Document

The document containing the elements.

connFrom Connector

The connector to be modified/aligned from.

connTo Connector

The target connector to align and connect to.

rotation double

Rotation about the connection axis (radians).

slope double

Slope value passed to Revit alignment API (units per Revit API expectation).

justification FabricationPartJustification

Justification used for the sloped alignment.

Remarks

Calls Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document.Regenerate between each operation to ensure geometry/connector state is current.
